title: rhododendron × standishii
intro: Rhododendron × standishii, also known as the Standish's Rhododendron, is a hybrid of the Rhododendron catawbiense and Rhododendron dauricum, belonging to the heath family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron × standishii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage. Rhododendron × standishii is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
